name: Break the Cube
short_description: SpeedRun, the most hardcore game in the world, you need to complete all levels and reach to the most epic end.
detailed_description: Do you like challenge?You want it? Take it. *Break The Cube* one of the best arcade hardcore games. Take your friends and try to go far as you can. 1 level - wow, nice game. 2 lvl - its so challenging. 3 lvl - hard as old bread in bakery. Let your brain explode, let your feelings blow up... let the game begin. Its Break The Cube , Its your own chance to forget about home and work problems, Relax and take pleasure
